Skip to content

Mounted React workspace

Agent-Native Dispatch

Agent-Native Dispatch Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

  • Home
  • Agents
  • Approval
